project_type: Next.js 16.2.6 app with React 19, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS 4
test_framework: Playwright for e2e tests (no unit test framework installed)
verification_instructions: 1. Run pnpm build to verify no TypeScript errors. 2. Run pnpm lint to verify ESLint passes.
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET network mode. No Docker daemon expected. Playwright tests require dev server running - use pnpm build + pnpm lint for verification instead.
contribution_requirements: Use @/ path aliases. Follow existing patterns for API routes (NextRequest/NextResponse). Client components use 'use client' directive.
key_patterns: API routes in app/api/*/route.ts using NextRequest/NextResponse. Client utilities in lib/ with 'use client' directive. Lead capture forms in components/lead-capture/. Environment variables in .env.example. Fire-and-forget pattern for external webhooks.
directory_structure: app/ - Next.js app router pages and API routes. components/ - React components. lib/ - shared utilities. tests/ - Playwright e2e tests. public/ - static assets.
